sentence_reviews.text: CUDA, ROCm, Triton, and custom kernels map tensor operations onto accelerator threads, memory tiles, vector units, and communication primitives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: CUDA and ROCm documentation support mapping computation to accelerator execution units and memory spaces; Triton/custom-kernel wording is not directly cited.
sentence_reviews.notes: Definition is technically defensible, but exact CUDA+ROCm+Triton coverage would need a Triton source.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels is to connect GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators, Algorithms & data structures to downstream capabilities including Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support some underlying mechanisms, but this downstream capability list is atlas graph positioning rather than a directly sourced claim.
sentence_reviews.notes: Use a narrower claim or add sources for each downstream dependency if exact verification is required.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators, Algorithms & data structures.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The operational risks named are plausible for deployed distributed/accelerated systems, but the cited packet sources do not directly support the full failure-mode list.
sentence_reviews.notes: The limitation is broad and templated; narrow it to source-backed risks for this node.
